plugins.name: dpsia
plugins.description: Data Protection Security Impact Assessment for vendor security evaluation against CIA triad, certification requirements, and GDPR compliance.

plugins.name: red-team
plugins.description: Adversarial analysis using 32 parallel expert agents. Stress-tests arguments, produces steelman + counter-argument, and validates decisions through competition.

plugins.name: council
plugins.description: Multi-agent debate system. Specialized agents discuss topics in rounds, challenge each other, and surface insights through intellectual friction.

plugins.name: prompting
plugins.description: Meta-prompting system for dynamic prompt generation using Anthropic best practices, templates, and patterns.

plugins.name: sales
plugins.description: Transform product documentation into compelling sales narratives with talking points, elevator pitches, and visual concept briefs.

plugins.name: sec-updates
plugins.description: Aggregate security news from tldrsec, Krebs, Schneier, and other sources into ranked updates across News, Research, and Ideas.

plugins.name: evals
plugins.description: AI agent evaluation framework based on Anthropic best practices. Create use cases, LLM judges, A/B prompt tests, and model comparisons.

plugins.name: first-principles
plugins.description: First principles reasoning framework. Deconstruct problems to fundamentals, challenge assumptions, and reconstruct optimal solutions.
